---
name: write_brain_md
type: tool
description: >
  Generate ~/gazzabyte/BRAIN.md from the compiled snapshot object.
  Human-readable local reference for the Telegram Claude Code session.
  Best-effort — failure here does not fail the brain_sync run.
---

# Tool: write_brain_md

## Purpose

Write `~/gazzabyte/BRAIN.md` — a human-readable version of the latest snapshot.
This is the file the Telegram session reads for quick context when Supabase
is slow or unavailable.

**DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE MANUALLY.** It is overwritten every 4 hours.

---

## Input

The full snapshot object (same as write_snapshot receives).

---

## Output

None. Side effect only: writes `~/gazzabyte/BRAIN.md`.

---

## Output Format

Write the file with EXACTLY this structure. Do not add sections that are not here.
Do not omit sections even if they are empty.

```markdown
<!-- AUTO-GENERATED BY brain_sync — DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY -->
<!-- Snapshot: [snapshot_id] | Generated: [ISO timestamp] | Freshness: 0 min -->

# Gazzabyte Brain — [human-readable date, e.g. "Wednesday 01 Apr 2026, 06:00 SGT"]

> Sync health: [ok ✅ | degraded ⚠️]
> [sync_health_reason if degraded — omit line if ok]
> Repos scanned: [comma-separated list] | Failed: [comma-separated list or "none"]

---

## Active Products

[For each product in products where status_category = 'active', in this format:]

### [display_name] [[health_emoji]]

- **Status**: [status_raw] — [current_phase]
- **Last commit**: [last_commit_msg] (`[last_commit_sha]`) — [relative time, e.g. "2h ago"]
- **Deploy**: [deploy_url or "not deployed"]
- **Confidence**: [confidence] — [confidence_reason]
[If contradictions non-empty:]
- **⚠️ Contradictions**: [contradictions joined by " | "]
[If active_blockers non-empty:]
- **Blockers**: [blockers joined by " | "]
[If next_milestones non-empty:]
- **Next**: [milestones joined by " | "]
[If revenue_signals non-empty and track_revenue = true:]
- **Revenue**: [signals joined by " | "]

---

## Done / Paused / Backlog

[For each product in products where status_category != 'active', one line each:]
- **[display_name]** — [status_category] — [last_commit_at relative or "no commits"]

---

## Wingmen Queue

- Pending: [queue_depth] | Running: [running_jobs.length] | Completed (24h): [completed_24h] | Failed (24h): [failed_24h]
- Worker: [worker_status]
[If running_jobs non-empty:]
- Running: [for each: "[repo]: [description]"]

---

## Revenue Pipeline

- Paying clients: [paying_clients joined by ", " or "none"]
- Active pitches: [active_pitches joined by ", " or "none"]
- Next action: [next_revenue_action]

---

## Attention Required

[If context_notes is non-null, render it here verbatim.]
[If context_notes is null, write: "All clear — no contradictions or flags detected."]

---

## Recent Activity (Last 24h)

[If recent_activity is empty:]
No activity recorded in the last 24 hours.

[If recent_activity is non-empty, up to 10 events:]
[For each event:]
- [[type_emoji]] `[repo]` — [summary] ([relative timestamp])

Type emojis:
- commit → 📝
- deploy → 🚀
- job_complete → ✅
- job_failed → ❌
- blocker_added → 🚧
- blocker_resolved → ✅
```

---

## Health Emojis

| health value | emoji |
|---|---|
| green | 🟢 |
| yellow | 🟡 |
| red | 🔴 |
| archived | ⬛ |

---

## Relative Time Formatting

Convert ISO timestamps to human-relative strings:
- < 1 hour ago → "Xm ago" (e.g. "23m ago")
- 1–23 hours ago → "Xh ago" (e.g. "3h ago")
- 1–6 days ago → "Xd ago" (e.g. "2d ago")
- > 6 days ago → full date "DD Mon YYYY"
- null → "never"

---

## Write Instruction

Write the file to `/Users/musa/gazzabyte/BRAIN.md` (expand ~).

Use a single file write operation — do not append or patch the existing file.
If the file already exists, overwrite it completely.

If the write fails (permission error, disk full, etc.):
- Log the error
- Return without throwing
- Do NOT fail the brain_sync run — Supabase is the source of truth
